ops.title: Port paired-DeLong persistence into production sweep/promotion
ops.description:
Instrument card v1.1 gap #4 (narrowed): production sweep/promotion code persists only ONE per-row probs vector per checkpoint, so comparative AUC deltas < ~0.045 are unresolvable there. The E27/E28 experiment harnesses demonstrated the full fix end-to-end: persist BOTH arms' per-row probs on the identical frame, compute a paired DeLong SE + CI + measured rho, verdict per the card rule. Measured rho 0.70–0.86 → practical paired MDE 0.017–0.024 on the n=628 frame (E27 resolved a −0.0254 delta the unpaired MDE never could).

Pattern to port: /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/E27/out/fullframe_summary.json + E28/out/delong.py. Card: ~/.cc-steer/experiments/instrument-card-v1.{md,json} §8. Ledgers: E27 972d8bdcc, E28 4455e21db, card 384378de3.

ops.text: sweep/promotion persists per-row probs for both arms of every comparison
promotion verdicts computed via paired DeLong + card decision rule (CI excludes 0 AND |delta| >= paired MDE at measured rho)
existing single-vector probs files remain readable
